positive_description: Extremely subtle deformation. At +3.0, no consistent visual change from neutral is discernible. If the conjugate pair pattern continues, this would be the right-lateralized counterpart to psi22.
negative_description: Extremely subtle deformation. At -3.0, visually indistinguishable from neutral.
symmetry_notes: Indeterminate. Predicted as the right-sided member of a psi22/psi23 conjugate pair based on pattern extrapolation, but cannot be confirmed from renders.
artifact_notes: No mesh artifacts at +/-3.0. Safe well beyond tested range.
useful_for: micro-texture in expression blends at very high weights
potentially part of fifth conjugate pair with psi22

interactions.psi22: Predicted conjugate pair if the alternating symmetric/asymmetric pattern continues

prose: Psi23 sits deep in the mid-frequency expression PCA band, predicted to be the right-lateralized counterpart to psi22 if the conjugate pair architecture persists this deep. All seven renders are visually identical to the neutral face. No feature-level change is discernible across the -3.0 to +3.0 sweep. The 3/4 profile views at +2.0 also show no detectable deviation from baseline. At this depth in the PCA ordering, the component captures vanishingly small variance and is practically invisible at standard expression weight budgets.
